The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is an old-school action-adventure game slows to a crawl with an overindulgent script.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Hellraiser: Revival Is A Grotesque Survival Horror I Can't Wait For
It's raunchy, it's sexually provocative, it's shaping up to be a hell of a good time. Clive Barker's Hellraiser: Revival remains one of my most anticipated games of the year, and I have no idea how it's not rated Adults Only.

#hellraiser #sgf #gaming

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Street Fighter 6 - Yasmine Character Gameplay Reveal Trailer
Hailing from the Philippines, Yasmine will rush you down with her skills in Eskrima on August 3!

Pay close attention to her movement lest you be on the wrong side of her karambit.

Yasmine can be purchased individually with Fighter Coins and the owners of the Year 4 Character Pass / Ultimate Pass will automatically get access to her when she releases.

#StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Capcom #Yasmine #Capcom #gaming #gameplay

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Gears of War: E-Day - Raven Extract Cinematic Trailer
Debuted at Unreal Fest Chicago, meet Specialist Daan Riggs as Bravo squad struggles to make a daring Raven extract aboard KR-80.

Pre-order Gears of War: E-Day to get Early Access to the Open Beta starting August 6th. Pre-orders also unlock the Exfil Dom Character Skin and the Exfil Weapon Set in-game at launch.
